rationale: Test test_rdkafka_pause_resume_partitions added to heimq/tests/integration.rs: assigns 2 partitions, pauses p0, produces to both, asserts only p1 arrives + no p0 leakage, resumes p0, asserts backlog drains. Marked #[ignore]; execution result_rev reports exit 0.

findings.summary: Test correctly gated with #[ignore] and matches the AC invocation pattern (cargo test ... --ignored).
Both pause-phase (only p1 delivered, p0 leak check) and resume-phase (p0 backlog drains, payloads match) assertions are present.
